prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为13368→13801→14114→19843→17068，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年出现异常大幅后移（19843），2025年回弹至17068，近两年 波动较大。2025年基准位次约17068名；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为1261→1261→1254→1245→1241人，呈逐年微降趋势；2026年计 划1253人，较2025年增加12人，小幅扩招约0.97%，扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名20 26年第80名，近年排名稳定在79–83区间，学校层次稳固；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件通报；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖 音热度一般（总排名第77），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低。综合来看，近年声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度；第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程获评A，为该 校唯一A-及以上学科，对应信息管理与信息系统等招生专业，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热 推荐，合肥工业大学以工科见长，热门专业吸引高分考生集中报考，可能推高整体最低位次。安徽省2026年高考总报名约45.1万人，物理类估算约31.3万人，较2025年32.1万人略 降，竞争略有缓解。；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，为本省211高校，在本省招生规模较大（物理类约1250人），本地考生报 考意愿较强，对本省生源有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17068、2026年小幅扩招约0.97%（位次数字增大方向）、声誉偏负面（位次数字增大方向）、物理 类考生总数略降（位次数字减小方向）、热门工科专业持续受追捧（位次数字减小方向）等多重因素。预计2026年最低位次约17187名，区间16 687–17687名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 13368 → 13801 → 14114 → 19843 → 17068, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, there was an abnormal large backward shift (19843), and in 2025 it rebounded to 17068, with significant fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17068. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province from 2021 to 2025 was 1261 → 1261 → 1254 → 1245 → 1241, showing a slight annual decrease. The 2026 plan is 1253, an increase of 12 compared to 2025, a small expansion of about 0.97%, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking, it ranks 80th, with stable rankings in the 79–83 range in recent years, indicating a solid school level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving reports of academic misconduct. The 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative (hot major admission scores plummeted). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 77th), with moderate to low exposure on short video platforms. Overall, the somewhat negative reputation in recent years may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering received an A rating, the only A- or above discipline at the university, corresponding to majors like Information Management and Information Systems, which have some appeal to students interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly popular and recommended. Hefei University of Technology excels in engineering, and popular majors attract high-scoring students to apply intensively, potentially raising the overall minimum ranking. The total number of Anhui Province Gaokao registrations in 2026 is approximately 451,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 313,000, a slight decrease from 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, as a provincial 211 university with a large enrollment scale in the province (about 1250 in Physics Category), and local students have a strong willingness to apply, providing stable appeal to local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 17068, a small expansion of about 0.97% in 2026 (tending to increase the ranking number), somewhat negative reputation (tending to increase the ranking number), a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates (tending to decrease the ranking number), and continued popularity of hot engineering majors (tending to decrease the ranking number), the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 17187, with a range of 16687–17687.

If the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 17500), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 safety majors and cautiously reach for Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 4300 → 4032 → 3541 → 3875 → 4693, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, and then shifting backward. The best ranking in recent years was in 2023 (3541), and it shifted backward to 4693 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1152 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4693. The enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province from 2021 to 2025 was 44 → 44 → 46 → 50 → 50, stabilizing at 50 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 46, a decrease of 4 from 2025, an 8% reduction, which slightly eases competition and tends to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable school level that also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative; Douyin popularity is average. History Category has few majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, English, Indonesian), so reputation impact is relatively limited. Management Science and Engineering (A) is the university's strongest discipline, but History Category majors do not directly correspond to it; Law corresponds to the Law discipline (the fifth round of evaluation did not separately list Hefei University of Technology's Law), and Ideological and Political Education corresponds to the Marxist Theory discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has social popularity recommendation (slightly hot), Ideological and Political Education popularity is stable; English/foreign language majors have average popularity and are wait-and-see. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Anhui Province is about 138,000, a slight decrease from 141,400 in 2025, easing competition slightly. Compared to 2024's score of 462, it rose by 15 points. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, with a small enrollment in History Category (about 46–50), providing stable appeal for local liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4693, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 8% (direction of decreasing ranking number), slightly negative reputation (direction of increasing ranking number), and a slight decrease in total History Category candidates (direction of decreasing ranking number), the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4448, with a range of 3948–4948.
